name: VirtualTourEasy
description: VirtualTourEasy is an AI-powered platform that allows users to create immersive 360° virtual tours from various inputs, including a single 2D photograph. The tool uses AI to generate a full panoramic view from a standard photo, eliminating the need for a 360° camera. It targets a broad range of industries, including real estate, hospitality, and architecture.
pricing: Offers a free plan (10 tours, VTE watermark). Paid plans start at $19/month ($15.20/month if billed annually) for more tours, storage, and AI credits.
features: AI 360° Panorama Generation from a single 2D photo
strengths: Directly offers the rare feature of generating a full 360° tour from a single 2D photo.
No expensive 360° camera hardware required, lowering the barrier to entry.
Offers a free tier for users to try the service.
Provides a complete platform with hosting, sharing, and embedding tools.
weaknesses: The primary focus is on real estate and hospitality, not specifically on interior material visualization (like tiles or flooring).
The quality of the AI-generated 360° view from a single photo may have limitations compared to true 360° photography.
Headquarters and company information are not readily available, which could be a concern for some enterprise customers.
target_market: Real estate agents, hospitality industry (hotels, restaurants), architects, tourism, and retail.
